text:

It already depends on these: 

-------------------------------------- 
# cd /usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-themes 
# make all-depends-list | grep p5 
/usr/ports/textproc/p5-XML-Simple 
/usr/ports/textproc/p5-XML-Parser 
/usr/ports/textproc/p5-XML-SAX-Expat 
/usr/ports/textproc/p5-XML-SAX 
/usr/ports/textproc/p5-XML-NamespaceSupport 
/usr/ports/devel/p5-Locale-gettext 
-------------------------------------- 

It looks like you got failure due to Perl upgrade.
